description:
This quiz evaluates a developer's proficiency with HTML5 semantic markup, testing their ability to utilize advanced structural tags over basic containers like divs and spans. Geared toward an intermediate difficulty level, it employs a playful, slightly sarcastic tone to motivate learners to modernize their coding practices and validate their resume claims.
Topics: HTML5, Semantic Elements, Frontend Development, Web Standards
Audience: Frontend developers, coding bootcamp students, and web professionals looking to verify or upgrade their markup skills.
